iotevents.detectormodel.DetectorModelDef.Docs: Information that defines how a detector operates.

iotevents.detectormodel.DetectorModelDes.Docs: A brief description of the detector model.

iotevents.detectormodel.DetectorModelNam.Docs: The name of the detector model.

iotevents.detectormodel.EvaluationMethod.Docs: Information about the order in which events are evaluated and how actions are executed.

iotevents.detectormodel.Key.Docs: The value used to identify a detector instance. When a device or system sends input, a new detector instance with a unique key value is created. AWS IoT Events can continue to route input to its corresponding detector instance based on this identifying information.   This parameter uses a JSON-path expression to select the attribute-value pair in the message payload that is used for identification. To route the message to the correct detector instance, the device must send a message payload that contains the same attribute-value.

iotevents.detectormodel.RoleArn.Docs: The ARN of the role that grants permission to AWS IoT Events to perform its operations.

iotevents.detectormodel.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
